title: AnimAI Design Tokens
summary: The shared design-token layer — color, radius, spacing, type, shadow, and motion as CSS variables. Drop <AnimAITheme /> once at your app root and every AnimAI component themes cohesively.
integration_instructions: Write the returned target_code to app/components/AnimAITheme.tsx.
Render <AnimAIThemeSlot /> once at the top of app/layout.tsx (inside <body>).
Override any --ai-* custom property in your global CSS to retheme all AnimAI components at once.
No dependencies to install — this is pure CSS.
